allow: Bash(python -c " import sys, json data = json.load\(sys.stdin\) vulns = data.get\('vulnerabilities', {}\) high_crit = {k: v for k, v in vulns.items\(\) if v.get\('severity'\) in \('high', 'critical'\)} print\(f'Total vulnerabilities: {data.get\(\\"metadata\\", {}\).get\(\\"vulnerabilities\\", {}\)}'\) print\(f'High/Critical: {len\(high_crit\)}'\) for name, info in high_crit.items\(\): print\(f' {name}: {info[\\"severity\\"]} - {info.get\(\\"title\\", \\"\\"\)}'\) ")

Bash(python -c " import sys, json data = json.load\(sys.stdin\) vulns = data.get\('vulnerabilities', {}\) high_crit = {k: v for k, v in vulns.items\(\) if v.get\('severity'\) in \('high', 'critical'\)} for name, info in high_crit.items\(\): print\(f'{name}: severity={info[\\"severity\\"]}'\) print\(f' via: {[x.get\(\\"title\\",\\"\\"\) or x.get\(\\"url\\",\\"\\"\) for x in info.get\(\\"via\\", []\) if isinstance\(x, dict\)]}'\) print\(f' fixAvailable: {info.get\(\\"fixAvailable\\"\)}'\) print\(\) ")
Bash(python -c "import sys,json; vs=json.load\(sys.stdin\); stable=[v for v in vs if not any\(x in v for x in ['alpha','beta','rc','canary']\)]; print\('Latest stable versions:', stable[-5:]\)")

Bash(python -c "import sys,json; vs=json.load\(sys.stdin\); v14=[v for v in vs if v.startswith\('14.'\) and not any\(x in v for x in ['alpha','beta','rc','canary']\)]; print\('Latest 14.x:', v14[-5:]\)")
Bash(python -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); [print\(k,v\) for k,v in d.get\('dependencies',{}\).items\(\) if any\(x in k for x in ['toast','sonner','hot-toast','notistack']\)]")
